description: Benchmark tests for arch-scaffolder skill - Generates System Architecture document skeleton from PRD

baseline_comparison.description: Manually reading the PRD and writing an architecture document from scratch

evals.name: prd-extraction
evals.prompt: Extract the key architectural information from the following PRD: 'We are building a SaaS task management platform. Users can create projects, assign tasks, and track progress. The system must support 10,000 concurrent users, integrate with Slack and GitHub, and provide a REST API for third-party integrations. Data must be persisted in a relational database with full audit logging.'

setup.prd_content: SaaS task management platform with user projects, task assignment, progress tracking, 10k concurrent users, Slack/GitHub integration, REST API, relational DB, audit logging

assertions.name: extracts_core_features
assertions.description: Should extract core features: projects, tasks, progress tracking

assertions.name: extracts_nfr_scalability
assertions.description: Should extract the scalability NFR (10,000 concurrent users)

assertions.name: extracts_integrations
assertions.description: Should extract Slack and GitHub integrations

assertions.name: extracts_api_requirement
assertions.description: Should extract REST API requirement

assertions.name: extracts_data_requirements
assertions.description: Should extract relational DB and audit logging requirements

evals.name: template-population
evals.prompt: Given the PRD for the task management SaaS platform, populate the standard architecture template with sections: Overview, System Context, Modules, Technology Stack, Non-Functional Requirements, and Integration Points.

assertions.name: has_overview_section
assertions.description: Should have a populated Overview section

assertions.name: has_modules_section
assertions.description: Should have a populated Modules section

assertions.name: has_tech_stack_section
assertions.description: Should have a populated Technology Stack section

assertions.name: has_nfr_section
assertions.description: Should have a Non-Functional Requirements section

assertions.name: has_integration_section
assertions.description: Should have an Integration Points section

assertions.name: no_unfilled_placeholders
assertions.description: Should not have any unfilled template placeholders like [TBD] or {{placeholder}}

evals.name: module-identification
evals.prompt: Analyze the task management SaaS PRD and identify the key system modules that should be represented in the architecture document.

assertions.name: identifies_auth_module
assertions.description: Should identify an authentication/user management module

assertions.name: identifies_core_domain_module
assertions.description: Should identify core domain modules (projects and tasks)

assertions.name: identifies_integration_module
assertions.description: Should identify an integration module for Slack/GitHub

assertions.name: identifies_api_module
assertions.description: Should identify an API module or gateway for REST endpoints

assertions.name: provides_module_count
assertions.description: Should identify at least 4 distinct modules

evals.name: tech-stack-detection
evals.prompt: From the task management SaaS PRD, detect or infer the appropriate technology stack. The PRD mentions: REST API, relational database, 10k concurrent users, Slack integration, GitHub integration, and SaaS deployment.

assertions.name: identifies_api_framework
assertions.description: Should detect or suggest an appropriate API framework

assertions.name: identifies_database
assertions.description: Should identify a relational database technology

assertions.name: addresses_scalability_tech
assertions.description: Should address technology choices for the 10k concurrent users requirement

assertions.name: mentions_integration_tech
assertions.description: Should mention integration technology (webhooks, OAuth, SDK)

evals.name: output-format-compliance
evals.prompt: Generate a complete architecture document skeleton for the task management SaaS platform. The output must follow the standard architecture document template format.

assertions.name: is_valid_markdown
assertions.description: Output must be valid markdown with H1/H2 headings

assertions.name: has_document_title
assertions.description: Document must have a clear H1 title related to the system

assertions.name: sections_in_logical_order
assertions.description: Overview section should appear before Modules section

assertions.name: uses_consistent_heading_levels
assertions.description: Main sections should be H2, sub-sections should be H3

assertions.name: includes_metadata_header
assertions.description: Document should include version/date metadata at the top
